description:
Advances: specled.spec_review, specled.mix_tasks

Create lib/mix/tasks/spec.review.ex following the pattern of spec.next:
- Flags: --base (default detected via ChangeAnalysis.detect_base_ref), --output (default _build/spec_review.html), --root, --open (boolean — open file in browser when local).
- Pipeline: SpecLedEx.MixRuntime.ensure_started!, build index, call SpecLedEx.Review.build_view, call SpecLedEx.Review.Html.render, write to output path, optionally invoke open/xdg-open on the file.
- Mirror option-parsing and error handling style of spec.next.ex.
title: Add mix spec.review task
